data.title: We Run Your Marketing. You Run Everything Else.
paragraphs: One monthly hour-long interview turns into 4+ articles, daily social posts, and a curated newsletter. With Google Search Console data driving topic selection, bi-monthly check-ins, and our team available to talk anytime.

cta_button.subtitle: Skip the call. Buy your first month and we'll book your interview.

data.title: Marketing is the thing that doesn't get done
data.subtitle: You know it matters. You know your competitors are doing it. You also know there are not enough hours in your week to write a blog post, plan a newsletter, edit a video, and post on LinkedIn.

items.title: You're the founder, the marketer, and the writer
items.text: Every piece of content competes with payroll, customer support, vendor calls, and the product itself. The marketing always loses.

items.title: You paid for writing and got blog posts
items.text: One article per week. No video. No social. No email. The post lives on the blog and dies there. Nothing else gets built from it.

items.title: Marketing happens when there's time
items.text: Which is never. Or it happens in bursts (a launch, a campaign), goes quiet for months, and you start over each time.

items.title: You watch other brands gain ground while yours stalls
items.text: They ship every week. Their search rankings climb. Their audience grows. You see what good marketing looks like and you can't get there alone.

data.title: Mix and Match
paragraphs: Four articles, social, video clips, and a newsletter is the default. It is not the only option. One month you might want a long-form white paper instead. The next, deep research or a case study. The next, a panel interview turned into a multimedia pillar.
The Flywheel flexes around what your business needs. Same monthly cadence, same dedicated team, different deliverables when the work calls for it.

data.eyebrow: Buy writing vs hand off marketing
data.title: What buying writing looks like vs what buying a marketing arm looks like
paragraphs: The Flywheel is different. We're not a writer for hire. We're the team that runs your marketing the way you would run it yourself.

old_way.heading: Buying writing
items: Generic copy that doesn't sound like your business
One blog post at a time, no multimedia
Content lives on the blog and dies there
ROI buried in dashboards you never open

new_way.heading: Buying a marketing arm
items: A dedicated writer who learns your business
Deliverables that flex around your month from one interview
Repurposed across video, social, slides, and email
Plain-English monthly reports that show what's working

data.title: How the Flywheel Spins
data.subtitle: One hour-long interview a month. Five turns of the flywheel.

steps.title: Monthly Interview + GSC Review
steps.text: One hour with your dedicated writer. We walk through what's happening in the business, then pull your Google Search Console data and surface the keyword opportunities sitting on page 2.

steps.title: 4 Articles + Pillar Post
steps.text: Your writer turns the interview and the GSC opportunities into 4 SEO articles plus a multimedia pillar post. Each article targets a real query Google is already showing you for.

steps.title: Daily Social + Video Clips
steps.text: Daily social posts on the platforms your audience is on, captioned video clips from your monthly interview, and illustrated graphics that repurpose every key idea.

steps.title: Mid-Month Status Call
steps.text: Halfway through the month we get back on a call. What's ranking, what's not, what to adjust. You can also reach us anytime in between. Communication is part of the deliverable.

steps.title: Reports + Newsletter
steps.text: A plain-English monthly report covers content performance AND social performance side by side. A curated email newsletter goes out to your list with the best of the month.

data.title: Content Cucumber - The Content Flywheel
data.label: See it in action
data.heading: What the Flywheel delivers
paragraphs: A short tour of how one monthly interview becomes 4+ articles, daily social posts, video clips, and a curated newsletter.

data.title: Not Just Articles. Build Your Marketing Mix.
data.subtitle: The Flywheel default is 4 articles, daily social, video clips, reports, and a newsletter. Anything below can swap in or get added on. Tell your writer what your business needs this month.

items.title: Long-form pillar pieces
items.text: Swap multiple articles for one deep, multimedia pillar when depth matters more than coverage.

items.title: Case studies
items.text: Your customer's win, written and designed. Sales asset and SEO asset in one.

items.title: Press releases
items.text: Written and distributed where it matters. Quarterly cadence or whenever news breaks in your business.

items.title: Customer interview series
items.text: We interview your customers and turn their words into content. Their voice, your brand.

items.title: Podcast clip distribution
items.text: Captioned short clips from podcast episodes, distributed across socials and articles.

items.title: Video production
items.text: Beyond the monthly interview clips. Full video shoots, edits, captioning, distribution.

items.title: Audio production
items.text: Full podcast episodes, voiceover, audio-version articles for accessibility and AI-search citation.

items.title: Email automation
items.text: Welcome flows, lifecycle programs, abandoned-cart sequences. Written and built in your platform.

items.title: Lead magnet refresh
items.text: Quarterly update of your gated assets. Checklists, guides, audits, calculators, anything that drives email signups.

items.title: Brand voice guide
items.text: One-time deliverable in month 1. Written from your monthly interviews so the voice on the page matches the voice in conversation.

items.title: Sales + landing page copy
items.text: Launches need their own pages. We write the page, you launch the campaign.

items.title: Slide decks
items.text: For sales calls, conference talks, board meetings. Designed and on-brand.

data.eyebrow: The math of doing it yourself
data.title: Why outsource the marketing
paragraphs: Business owners are busy. They're running a business. Hiring a dedicated marketing person costs thousands of dollars a month before a single article ships, before a single newsletter goes out, before any social calendar exists.
Outsource the marketing to Content Cucumber instead. You get a writer, a videographer, a designer, an email person, and an SEO analyst working on your business every month. For $1,000.

data.title: What changes when marketing gets done
data.subtitle: The Flywheel turns one monthly conversation into 12 months of momentum. The shape of the year changes.

items.title: Marketing exists
items.text: Marketing is firing every month for the first time in your business. The thing that wasn't getting done is getting done.

items.title: Search rankings climb
items.text: Pillar posts and SEO articles start ranking. New keywords show up in Google Search Console. Traffic builds week over week.

items.title: Audience deepens
items.text: Email opens climb and social engagement deepens. Your monthly newsletter becomes something readers wait for, not delete.

items.title: Brand authority lands
items.text: You become known for something specific. The interviews, the videos, the articles, the data. Consistent voice changes how the market sees you.

data.title: Frequently Asked Questions
data.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Content Flywheel.

items.question: What's included in the Flywheel every month?
items.answer: SEO blog articles, a multimedia pillar post, illustrated graphics, captioned video clips from your monthly interview, social posts across your platforms, a plain-English progress report, and a curated email newsletter. All built around the same monthly conversation with your writer.

items.question: How does the monthly interview work?
items.answer: We schedule a 1-hour call between you and your dedicated writer once a month. You share what's happening in the business, your wins, your challenges, what you want to be known for. Your writer also walks through your Google Search Console data with you, surfaces keyword opportunities sitting on page 2, and uses the conversation to plan the month's content calendar.

items.question: What about communication between meetings?
items.answer: We're available anytime. Mid-month we get back on a call to check what's working and adjust where needed. Outside of that you can reach your writer or our team whenever something changes in your business. Communication is part of the deliverable, not an upsell.

items.question: What does the monthly report show?
items.answer: Content performance and social performance side by side. Which articles ranked, which queries you're showing for, which social posts drove engagement, what to push on next month. Plain English, no black-box dashboards.

items.question: Do I get the same writer every month?
items.answer: Yes. Every client is assigned a dedicated writer who learns your brand voice, your industry, and your customers. Consistency in voice builds reader trust and search rankings over time.

items.question: Who owns the content you create?
items.answer: You do. Everything we write or design for you is yours to keep, edit, republish, or repurpose however you want. No licensing fees, no usage limits.

items.question: What's the minimum commitment?
items.answer: There isn't one. Cancel any time. We earn your business each month by delivering work you're proud to publish.

items.question: Do I need to provide topics, or do you research them?
items.answer: Either works. Topic development is included in every plan, with SEO research and competitive gap analysis. We can also work from your existing content calendar.

items.question: Can you publish the content for me?
items.answer: Yes. Blog publishing is included in every plan. We handle Shopify, WordPress, Magento, BigCommerce, WooCommerce, HubSpot, and custom platforms. Tell us where it goes and we put it there.

items.question: How many revisions do I get?
items.answer: Unlimited. We rewrite anything that's off. We change direction on request. Your writer is here to make you happy.

items.question: Is this just a writing service?
items.answer: No. The Flywheel turns one monthly conversation into a full marketing engine across blogs, video, social, and email. You also get a writer who knows your business, monthly progress reports, and a team backing them up.

items.question: What industries do your writers cover?
items.answer: Our team has deep expertise across ecommerce, retail, fashion, beauty, home goods, B2B wholesale, food and beverage, SaaS, healthcare, professional services, and more. We assign writers based on industry fit.

items.question: How long until I see results?
items.answer: SEO blogs typically start ranking in 3-6 months. Social engagement and email opens build week over week. Each month builds on the last, so month 6 looks very different from month 1.

items.question: How do you know what to write about my business?
items.answer: Your monthly interview is the source. Your writer extracts themes from what you said, then layers in keyword research, competitor gaps, and seasonal trends. You stay in the driver's seat. We bring the structure.

items.question: Do you require a HubSpot account?
items.answer: No. HubSpot is a great addition (we're a HubSpot Solutions Partner) but the Flywheel works on any platform. HubSpot customers can ask about our free audit before the call.

data.title: Already on HubSpot?
data.subtitle: HubSpot is a great addition to the Flywheel, not a requirement. HubSpot customers get a free audit before the call.

brands.name: Free HubSpot Audit
brands.description: We'll review your portal setup, content workflow, automation, and reporting. You get a written audit and clear next steps. No obligation.

data.title: Hand off the marketing.
data.text: Tell us about your business. We'll build a plan together. $1,000/mo, all-in. No tiers, no commitment, no upsells.
